HomePage.title: Empower your Learning with AI

register.title: Create Student Account

Agents.title: Select your learning partner
Agents.subtitle: Our specialized AI agents are ready to help you master any subject through interactive dialogue.

math.title: Mathematics Agent
math.desc: Expert in Algebra, Calculus, and Geometry. Able to solve complex proofs and explain step-by-step logic.

science.title: Science Specialist
science.desc: Explore the natural world, chemical reactions, and the scientific method with interactive experiments.

physics.title: Physics Tutor
physics.desc: Master the laws of motion, thermodynamics, and quantum mechanics through visual simulations.

biology.title: Biology Expert
biology.desc: Deep dive into genetics, cellular biology, and ecosystems with detailed diagrams and case studies.

social.title: Social Studies Guide
social.desc: Uncover historical events, geographical wonders, and complex sociological structures of our world.

custom.title: New Custom Agent
custom.desc: Create a specialized AI for a specific exam or textbook.
